name: html-boilerplate
description: A minimal starter template for static HTML projects

scripts.serve:production: npm run compile:production && npm run serve
scripts.compile:development: npm run html:compile && npm run js:compile && npm run css:compile && npm run html:lint && npm run js:lint && npm run css:lint
scripts.compile:production: npm run html:production && npm run js:production && npm run css:production && node scripts/inline-styles && node scripts/inline-scripts && node scripts/cleanup-public --ext=js,css && npm run html:lint
scripts.html:watch: npm run html:compile && chokidar "src/index.html" --command "npm run html:compile"
scripts.html:lint:watch: npm run html:lint && chokidar "public/*.html" --command "npm run html:lint"
scripts.js:lint:watch: npm run js:lint && chokidar "public/*.js" --command "npm run js:lint"
scripts.css:lint:watch: npm run css:lint && chokidar "public/*.css" --command "npm run css:lint"
scripts.watch: concurrently "npm run html:watch" "npm run js:watch" "npm run css:watch" "npm run html:lint:watch "npm run js:lint:watch "npm run css:lint:watch"
